temporal_boundary: backtest window ends before future detection; FUTURE_DETECTION_GAP=1 day

data_leakage_controls.future_data_not_in_lesson: Future detection data is passed only to detection step, not lesson extraction
data_leakage_controls.labels_not_in_control_generator: Expected labels are not passed to control synthesis
data_leakage_controls.temporal_isolation: Backtest window ends at T-0; future detection at T+1
data_leakage_controls.baseline_input_isolation: Baselines receive only permitted inputs per docs/evaluation.md

sample_size_note: Sample size is too small for meaningful statistical inference. Results are on the synthetic benchmark only.
